_comment: Concept-agnostic export of the ElevenLabs agent. Edit for a new concept, then run setup.mjs. Tool ids are per-agent (created when you attach Cal.com in the dashboard) so they are NOT listed here; attach them in the dashboard and the prompt references them by name.
first_message: Hey, thanks for checking out Ranah Studios. Quick heads up, I'm an AI agent, the same kind we build for local businesses. I can tell you what we do, or book you a free demo. What brings you in today?

website_or_social.description: The caller's website or social handle, if given.

reason_for_call.description: The main thing they want to fix or cover.

product_interest.description: Website, AI voice receptionist, both, or unsure.

booked_time.description: The day/time of the demo they booked, if any.
